summary: Prompt scaffolding overhaul + image model auto-fallback. Added anti-AI-slop rules, visual hierarchy guidance, face expression taxonomy by tone, typography best practices, YouTube CTR tips, and specific A/B plan instructions. Auto-fallback chain (flux→kontext→flux-schnell→turbo→sdxl) on image load failure. Model picker defaults to preference order. 36/36 tests passing. Build + lint clean. Git committed as 2e11929. Still blocked by human-provided GitHub/Vercel credentials and real BYOP key.
currentFocus: Deploy readiness. All code quality gates green. Improving prompt quality and resilience while waiting for external deployment dependencies.
nextTasks: Validate end-to-end generation with real BYOP user key (external dependency)
Push git repo to GitHub remote (requires human-provided token/account)
Create Vercel project and connect to GitHub repo (requires human-provided account)
blockers: Need human-provided GitHub remote / Vercel account details to publish repo and create production project.
Need real Pollinations user key to fully validate generation end-to-end. Mock mode provides safe dev testing but does not replace live API quality validation.
knownLimitations: Image quality depends on user's Pollinations key budget and prompt scaffolding.
Face expression control via text-to-image is approximate.
No channel brand memory or persistent user accounts.
Concept regeneration replaces a single concept from a fresh 6-pack; exact targeting not guaranteed.
End-to-end generation quality not yet validated with real Pollinations user key.
Mock mode produces tone-aware placeholder concepts for safe dev testing but does not exercise live LLM quality.
